title: setaria lachnea
intro: Setaria lachnea, also known as black millet or black bristle grass, is a type of plant that belongs to the Poaceae family. It is traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Setaria lachnea include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine as a poultice or salve to treat various skin conditions.
